title: stachys annua subsp. ammophila
intro: Stachys annua subsp. ammophila, also known as woolly betony, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of woolly betony lie in its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce inflammation, making it a popular remedy for anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of woolly betony include its ability to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality, as well as its antimicrobial and antispasmodic properties. Woolly betony can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
